memory.extractEmpty: No conversation found. Please chat with Agent first.

complianceStandards.title: Compliance Standards
complianceStandards.description: We are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. Our system complies with the following regulations and standards:

chinaLaw.title: Personal Information Protection Law of the PRC
chinaLaw.description: Complies with the Personal Information Protection Law of the People's Republic of China, ensuring lawful collection, storage, and use of personal information.

gdpr.title: EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
gdpr.description: Complies with EU GDPR standards, ensuring data subject rights, data minimization, purpose limitation, and transparency in processing.

usLaw.title: US Data Protection Laws
usLaw.description: Complies with US federal and state data protection laws including CCPA (California Consumer Privacy Act) and industry best practices.

privacy.dataCollectionHint: Enable anonymous usage data collection to help us improve the product
privacy.protectSensitiveHint: Automatically sanitize sensitive information (API keys, passwords, etc.) from logs and error messages
privacy.dataRetentionHint: Number of days to retain data (1-365 days), auto-delete after expiration
privacy.collectionFrequencyHint: Sampling rate (0-100%), 100% means collect all data
privacy.gdprRightsHint: Under privacy regulations, you have the right to export or delete all your data
privacy.exportConfirm: This will export all analytics data related to you (JSON format). Continue?
privacy.deleteConfirm: ⚠️ This will permanently delete all analytics data and cannot be recovered. Are you sure?
privacy.deleteSuccess: All analytics data has been deleted

proxy.title: Proxy Configuration
proxy.description: Configure proxy for LLM API access. Leave empty to use system default or direct connection.

scheduledTasks.title: Scheduled Tasks Management
scheduledTasks.description: Create and manage scheduled Agent tasks. Supports delayed execution, specific time, recurring execution, and Cron expression scheduling.

checkpoints.title: Checkpoint Management
checkpoints.description: Manage Agent task graph state checkpoints. Create checkpoints at any time and restore to previous states when needed.
checkpoints.emptyHint: Create your first checkpoint to save current state
checkpoints.restoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore from checkpoint "
checkpoints.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete checkpoint "

security.title: Global Security Settings
security.description: Configure your global default security policies. These settings will serve as defaults for all workspaces, and workspaces can override them based on your configuration.

overrideControls.title: Workspace Override Controls
overrideControls.allowPathOverride: Allow workspaces to override path security settings
overrideControls.allowPathOverrideHelp: If disabled, all workspaces must use your path security configuration
overrideControls.allowCommandOverride: Allow workspaces to override command execution security settings
overrideControls.allowCommandOverrideHelp: If disabled, all workspaces must use your command execution security configuration
overrideControls.allowSandboxOverride: Allow workspaces to override sandbox configuration
overrideControls.allowSandboxOverrideHelp: If disabled, all workspaces must use your sandbox configuration
overrideControls.enforceSandboxHelp: When enabled, workspaces cannot disable sandbox isolation
overrideControls.allowToolOverride: Allow workspaces to override tool permission settings
overrideControls.allowToolOverrideHelp: If disabled, all workspaces must use your tool permission configuration
overrideControls.allowNetworkOverride: Allow workspaces to override network security settings
overrideControls.allowNetworkOverrideHelp: If disabled, all workspaces must use your network security configuration
overrideControls.allowResourceOverride: Allow workspaces to override resource limit settings
overrideControls.allowResourceOverrideHelp: If disabled, all workspaces must use your resource limit configuration

sandbox.title: Sandbox Configuration
sandbox.enableSandboxHelp: Enable sandbox to isolate command execution environment for improved security
sandbox.sandboxModeHelp: Choose sandbox type: Docker container, lightweight sandbox, or disabled
sandbox.allowFallbackHelp: Automatically fallback to lightweight sandbox when Docker sandbox is unavailable
sandbox.enforceSandboxHelp: When enabled, all workspaces cannot disable sandbox
sandbox.dropAllCapabilitiesHelp: Remove all Linux capabilities for higher security. If disabled, container retains default capabilities (more compatible but less secure)
sandbox.noNewPrivilegesHelp: Prevent processes from elevating privileges through setuid or setgid programs. When enabled, prevents privilege escalation attacks (more secure)
sandbox.sandboxDisableNetworkHelp: Disable network access to prevent network attacks. When enabled, more secure but limits features requiring network access
sandbox.containerRuntimeHelp: Choose container runtime: auto-detect, Docker, or Podman

workspaces.title: Select Your
workspaces.description: Manage and access your workspaces, start your AI agent collaboration journey
workspaces.noWorkspacesDesc: Create your first workspace to get started

scheduledTasks.title: Title
scheduledTasks.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task?

security.title: Workspace Security Settings
security.description: Configure security policies for this workspace. These settings can override your global defaults if allowed.
security.resetSuccess: Security settings reset to user defaults

pathSecurity.title: Path Security Configuration
pathSecurity.enableTraversalProtectionHelp: Prevents access to parent directories using ../
pathSecurity.allowAbsolutePathsHelp: Allows commands to use absolute paths starting with /
pathSecurity.allowedExtensionsHelp: File extensions that agents are allowed to access
pathSecurity.deniedExtensionsHelp: File extensions that agents are never allowed to access
pathSecurity.maxFileSizeHelp: Maximum size of files that can be read or written
pathSecurity.pathAccessModeHelp: How strictly to enforce path boundaries

commandSecurity.title: Command Execution Security Configuration
commandSecurity.enableWhitelistHelp: Only allow commands from the whitelist to execute
commandSecurity.useSystemWhitelistHelp: Include system-defined safe commands in whitelist
commandSecurity.allowedCommandsHelp: Commands that agents are allowed to execute
commandSecurity.deniedCommandsHelp: Commands that agents are never allowed to execute
commandSecurity.allowShellCommandsHelp: Allow execution of shell commands via pipes and redirects
commandSecurity.allowBackgroundCommandsHelp: Allow commands to run in the background
commandSecurity.allowPipeCommandsHelp: Allow commands to be chained with pipes
commandSecurity.commandTimeoutHelp: Maximum time allowed for command execution (seconds)

sandbox.title: Sandbox Configuration
sandbox.enableSandboxHelp: Execute commands in an isolated sandbox environment
sandbox.allowFallbackHelp: Allow falling back to direct execution if sandbox fails

modePermissions.title: Mode Permissions Configuration
modePermissions.restrictPlanWrite: Restrict Write Operations in Plan Mode
modePermissions.restrictPlanWriteHelp: Prevent file modifications during Plan mode
modePermissions.planModeToolsHelp: Tools that are available in Plan mode
modePermissions.disabledModesHelp: Select which modes should be disabled
modePermissions.confirmModeSwitchHelp: Ask for user confirmation before switching modes

toolPermissions.title: Tool Permissions Configuration
toolPermissions.baseAllowedGroupsHelp: Tool groups that are allowed by default
toolPermissions.allowedGroupsHelp: Tool groups allowed in this workspace
toolPermissions.baseDeniedGroupsHelp: Tool groups that are denied by default
toolPermissions.deniedGroupsHelp: Tool groups denied in this workspace
toolPermissions.baseAllowedToolsHelp: Specific tools that are allowed by default
toolPermissions.allowedToolsHelp: Specific tools allowed in this workspace
toolPermissions.baseDeniedToolsHelp: Specific tools that are denied by default
toolPermissions.deniedToolsHelp: Specific tools denied in this workspace

network.title: Network Security Configuration
network.enableRestrictionsHelp: Restrict network access to specific domains
network.allowBrowserHelp: Allow agents to use browser automation tools
network.allowExternalApiHelp: Allow agents to make external API requests

resource.title: Resource Limits Configuration
resource.maxConcurrentTasksHelp: Maximum number of tasks running simultaneously
resource.maxMemoryUsageHelp: Maximum memory the agent can use
resource.maxExecutionTimeHelp: Maximum time for a single task execution

advanced.title: Advanced Security Options
advanced.requireConfirmationHelp: Ask for user confirmation before dangerous operations
advanced.enforcePolicyHelp: Force all workspaces to use these security settings

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Manage and search your knowledge base
knowledge.uploadTip: Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD formats, max 100MB per file
knowledge.reindexConfirm: Are you sure you want to reindex document "{name}"?
knowledge.extractionStrategyHint: Select the method for extracting entities and relations from documents
knowledge.selectBaseFirst: Please select a knowledge base first
